Southern Lens Photography
Authentic, timeless wedding photography in Acadiana.

Lafayette, LA Serves Lafayette and surrounding Acadiana 1 wedding featured

About photographers

Southern Lens Photography
Authentic, timeless wedding photography in Acadiana.

Southern Lens Photography captures the authentic emotion and beauty of your wedding day. Based in Lafayette, Louisiana, we specialize in documentary-style wedding photography that tells your story naturally.

With over a decade of experience photographing weddings across Acadiana, we bring a relaxed, unobtrusive approach that lets you be fully present in every moment — while we take care of preserving it forever.

Our gallery-worthy images are delivered in a timeless style that will look just as beautiful in thirty years as they do today.

Packages & pricing

3 ways to work together.

Essential
Starting at $2,000

Perfect for intimate ceremonies and receptions.

  • 6 hours of coverage
  • One photographer
  • Online gallery delivery
  • Print release
Premium
Starting at $3,500

Our most popular package for full wedding days.

  • 10 hours of coverage
  • Two photographers
  • Engagement session
  • Online gallery + USB
Heirloom
Starting at $5,000

The complete experience, start to finish.

  • Unlimited coverage
  • Two photographers
  • Engagement session
  • Fine art album
  • Wall art consultation
Featured in real weddings

1 couple, documented.


The Magnolia Ballroom
The Magnolia Ballroom · Oct 2024
Reviews

What couples say.

"Southern Lens captured every single moment exactly as we lived it. We cried looking through the gallery. Worth every penny and then some."
— Emma & James T. · October 2024
"They were invisible on our wedding day — which is exactly what we wanted. The photos are stunning. We've already recommended them to three couples."
— Claire & David M. · April 2024
